title: JoinMe
subtitle: Meet new people in real life

q1.title: What is JoinMe?
q1.answer: JoinMe is a people-to-people app for spontaneous and planned real-life meetups.

q2.title: What is spontaneous mode?
q2.answer: You post what you feel like doing, tap once, and go live. People nearby can find and join you, and you can join them. Then you just meet. Simple and full of vibes.

q3.title: What is planned mode?
q3.answer: You create an activity for any time in the next 7 days. Others see it and can join.

q4.title: Are matches guaranteed in a short time?
q4.answer: Not guaranteed. It's about vibes and real experiences. If it clicks, it's fun. If not, it's still real.

q5.title: Can I use spontaneous mode everywhere and anytime?
q5.answer: Technically yes. But since we are still small, it may not be useful everywhere yet. For now, we publish weekly meetup time-windows in specific Berlin areas, and update them in the app. As we grow, we will extend these windows. If we reach a very large user base, spontaneous mode may run all the time and everywhere.

q6.title: Do I have to pay to use JoinMe?
q6.answer: No. We just started, so JoinMe is free right now. We currently use ads and may add paid features later.

q7.title: Do other users always see my location?
q7.answer: No. Your location is only shared when you turn on spontaneous mode. In this mode, your approximate location is visible so others nearby can find you. Please use spontaneous mode only in public places, and don’t forget to turn it off when you’re done meeting or leave the public area.

homeLite.lead: Find real people nearby. No big organizers. Just people meeting people.
homeLite.note: Quick hangs, chill plans, new experiences.
homeLite.spontaneousText: Open the app, see who is up for coffee, basketball, a walk, or random fun right now.
homeLite.plannedText: Set a time, pick a vibe, and let people join. From tomorrow brunch to next week hikes.
homeLite.stepsText: Create or join an activity, chat a bit, then meet in real life.

index.heroP1: In a world glued to screens, real human interaction has never been more important.
index.heroP2: is on a mission to turn technology into a bridge for meaningful, real-life connections.
index.heroP3b: , it all starts with you — host activities or join inspiring ones around you. Like the idea? Download the app and dive in.
index.heading: How JoinMe Works
index.description: JoinMe helps you meet new people in your area — whether through your interests or simply your mood. Take part in spontaneous meetups or plan activities in advance, chat with members, and turn connections into real-life experiences.

why.title: Why JoinMe?
why.text: JoinMe is a people-to-people app. It helps you meet people in real life, spontaneous or planned. Not every person will be your match, and that's okay. JoinMe is about new experiences and shared moments.
why.text1: Sick of scrolling through endless short videos and the latest trends? Ready to take a break from your screen and actually meet awesome people nearby?
why.text2: JoinMe is a people-to-people app. It helps you meet people in real life, spontaneous or planned. Not every person will be your match, and that's okay. JoinMe is about new experiences and shared moments.
why.benefit1: Find people who share your interests
why.benefit2: Join or create activities — spontaneous or planned
why.benefit3: Turn chats into real laughs and smiles
why.benefit4: Explore your city through new eyes
why.activitiesTitle: What Can You Do with JoinMe?
why.activitiesSubtitle: Unleash Your Imagination. Your world, your activities. From quiet walks in the park to epic adventures or quirky hobbies, you are free to create activities you love — safely and legally.
why.activity1: 🌿 Go for a walk in the park and try to name the plants together
why.activity2: 🧗‍♀️ Discover local climbing gyms with other adventurers
why.activity3: 🎨 Join a street art or sketch walk with creative minds
why.activity4: 📚 Organize a chill coffee & book chat at your favorite cafe
why.activity6: 🚴‍♂️ Explore your city on a group bike ride
why.activity7: 🎤 Find others who love karaoke and belt out some tunes
why.end: The only limit is your imagination — go create memorable moments.

feature1Text: Life’s best moments are spontaneous. Create or join instant activities nearby — from a quick coffee to a late-night party. Perfect when you’re feeling social and want to meet people right now.
feature2Text: Turn ideas into real plans and make your week more exciting. Create your own activities or join those from others — today, tomorrow, or anytime in the next 7 days. From hiking and sports to shopping or study groups, it’s all up to you.
feature3Text: Take charge of your meetups: approve who joins and chat only when you’re ready. See all activity details upfront — time, place, and type. Create your own adventures or join spontaneous and planned activities anytime. Feel secure, stay in control, and enjoy real-life connections on your terms.

safety.title: Safety Standards
safety.intro: JoinMe helps people connect, but each user is responsible for their own decisions and safety during meetups.

section1.title: 1. User Responsibility
section1.text: Every user is responsible for their own behavior, choices, and personal safety when using the app or meeting others.

section2.title: 2. Reporting
section2.text: Users can report content or other users in the app, or report abuse by email. Reports are acknowledged automatically.

section3.title: 3. Manual Review
section3.text: Reports are reviewed manually by the app operator. Based on that review, content or accounts may be removed.

section4.title: 4. Safety Tips
section4.text: JoinMe provides tools and guidance, but users remain responsible for their own safety.

section5.title: 5. Contact Information
section5.text: To report abuse in the app or by email, contact us at
section5.note: JoinMe provides tools and guidance, but users remain responsible for their own safety.

tips.tip1: 👥 Meet in public places like cafés or parks.
tips.tip2: 📱 Let a friend or family member know your plans.
tips.tip4: 🚗 Use your own transport or public traffic.
tips.tip5: ⚠️ Trust your instincts - leave if something feels off.
tips.tip6: 🚨 You can always report another user in the app.
